name: Hovercard

aliases.name: Config
aliases.comment:
Configure the hovercard.

  - tickLength: length of the tick
  - zIndex: z-index css property of the hovercard
  - borderColor, borderWidth, backgroundColor: minimal styling for the hovercard and the small arrow pointing to the element
  - viewport: override the viewport in which the hovercard can be positioned. This is needed if you render the hovercard within an HTML element with CSS attribute `position`.
aliases.type: { tickLength : Basics.Float, zIndex : Basics.Int, borderColor : Color.Color, backgroundColor : Color.Color, borderWidth : Basics.Float, viewport : Maybe.Maybe { x : Basics.Float, y : Basics.Float, width : Basics.Float, height : Basics.Float } }

values.name: getElement
values.comment: Trigger positioning of the hovercard to the target element programmatically.

values.name: init
values.comment:
Initialize the hovercard with the ID of the target HTML element.

It tries to find the target element in the DOM using [Browser.Dom.getElement](https://package.elm-lang.org/packages/elm/browser/1.0.2/Browser-Dom#getElement).

values.name: subscriptions
values.comment: Subscribes to [Browser.Dom.onResize](https://package.elm-lang.org/packages/elm/browser/1.0.2/Browser-Events#onResize) in order to reposition the hovercard automatically.

values.name: view
values.comment:
Render the hovercard.

Example:

    view
        -- configuration
        { tickLength = 16
        , zIndex = 1
        , borderColor = Color.black
        , backgroundColor = Color.lightBlue
        , borderWidth = 2
        , viewport = Nothing
        }
        -- Hovercard model
        model
        -- additional styles for the hovercard, eg. a shadow
        [ style "box-shadow" "5px 5px 5px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.25)"
        ]
        -- the content of the hovercard
        [ div
            []
            [ text "Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet"
            ]
        ]
values.type: Hovercard.Config -> Hovercard.Model -> List.List (Html.Attribute msg) -> List.List (Html.Html msg) -> Html.Html msg
